sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: INTUITIVE SURGICAL INC의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 1분기 매출이 27억 7,000만 달러로 전년 동기 22억 5,000만 달러 대비 23% 증가했습니다.
다빈치(da Vinci) 수술 시스템 설치대수가 11,395대로 12% 늘었습니다.

businessChanges.text: 다빈치 시술량이 약 16%, Ion 시술량이 약 39% 증가하며 소모품·액세서리 매출 성장을 견인했습니다.
1분기 시스템 매출은 6억 5,100만 달러로 전년 동기 5억 2,300만 달러에서 늘었습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 소모품·액세서리와 시스템 매출이 고르게 늘며 23% 매출 성장을 이끌었습니다.

watchItems.text: 다빈치 5 채택 확산과 Ion 시술량 고성장(약 39%)이 지속될지가 향후 성장의 핵심입니다.
설치 기반 확대에 따른 반복적 소모품 매출 비중 상승 추세에 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: stems, compared with 49 in the first quarter of 2025. • The Company grew its da Vinci surgical system installed base to 11,395 systems as of March 31, 2026, an increase of 12% compared with 10,189 as of March 31, 2025. The Company grew its Ion endoluminal system installed base to 1,041 systems as of March 31, 2026, an increase of 22% compared with 853 as of March 31, 2025. • First quarter 2026 revenue of $2.77 billion increased 23%, compared with $2.25 billion in the first quarter of 2025. • First quarter 2026 GAAP net income attributable to Intuitive Surgical, Inc. was $822 million, or $2.28 per   Normalized numeric aliases: $2.77 billion = 27억 7,000만 달러; $2.25 billion = 22억 5,000만 달러; $822 million = 8억 2,200만 달러; $698 million = 6억 9,800만 달러; $901 million = 9억 100만 달러; $662 million = 6억 6,200만 달러; $2.77 = 2.77달러; $2.25 = 2.25달러; $2.28 = 2.28달러; $662 = 662달러; $2.50 = 2.50달러; $1.81 = 1.81달러; 11,395 million = 113억 9,500만 달러; 10,189 million = 101억 8,900만 달러; 1,041 million = 10억 4,100만 달러.

st quarter of 2025. • The Company repurchased 2.3 million shares of its common stock for $1.1 billion in the first quarter of 2026. Q1 Financial Summary Gross profit, income from operations, net income attributable to Intuitive Surgical, Inc., and net income per diluted share attributable to Intuitive Surgical, Inc. are reported on a GAAP and non-GAAP* basis. The non-GAAP* measures are described below and are reconciled to the corresponding GAAP measures at the end of this release. First quarter 2026 revenue was $2.77 billion, an increase of 23% compared with $2.25 billion in the first quarter of 2025. The higher first quarter revenue was driven by growth in procedure volume, higher da Vinci system placements, and an increase in the installed b  Normalized numeric aliases: 2.3 million = 230만 달러; $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $2.77 billion = 27억 7,000만 달러; $2.25 billion = 22억 5,000만 달러; $1.69 billion = 16억 9,000만 달러; $1.1 = 1.1달러; $2.77 = 2.77달러; $2.25 = 2.25달러; $1.37 = 1.37달러; $1.69 = 1.69달러.

lion in the first quarter of 2025. The increase in instruments and accessories revenue was primarily driven by approximately 16% growth in da Vinci procedure volume, customer buying patterns, and approximately 39% growth in Ion procedure volume. First quarter 2026 systems revenue was $651 million, compared with $523 million in the first quarter of 2025. The higher systems revenue reflected increased da Vinci system placements, a higher lease installed base, and higher da Vinci system average selling prices compared with the first quarter of 2025. The Company placed 431 da Vinci surgical systems, of which 232 were da Vinci 5 systems, in the first quarter of 2026, compared with 367 systems, of which 147 were da Vinci 5 systems, in the first quarter of 2025.
